name: changfenhuang-code
author: Changfenhuang Code
description: Use Changfenhuang Code right from your terminal. It can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.

scripts.prepare: node -e "if (!process.env.AUTHORIZED) { console.error('ERROR: Direct publishing is not allowed.\nPlease see the release workflow documentation to publish this package.'); process.exit(1); }"
